reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Más de media hora haciendo fila por un problema con una factura A y mientras tanto en lugar de tickear al resto los 4 empleados dando vueltas sin siquiera avisar la demora.
Baños limpios
Ambiente de la tienda regular

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. I waited in line for over half an hour because of a problem with an invoice, and instead of checking in the rest of the customers, the four employees just wandered around without even notifying anyone of the delay.
Clean restrooms. Average store atmosphere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocWZmTFZBEAE
